mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_common_code (code_id, code_group_id, code_name, code_value, sort_order, description, created_by) VALUES (#{codeId}, #{codeGroupId}, #{codeName}, #{codeValue}, #{sortOrder}, #{description}, #{createdBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_common_code SET code_group_id = #{codeGroupId}, code_name = #{codeName}, code_value = #{codeValue}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, description = #{description}, modified_by = #{modifiedBy}, modified_date = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE code_id = #{codeId}
